description: Context attached to events related to a specific piece of content (movie, show, season, or episode). Always present on title-related events.

titleId.description: Numeric title identifier. For movies: the movie ID. For shows/seasons/episodes: the parent show ID. Use jwEntityId for the prefixed version that joins to the objects table.

objectType.description: Content type. Values: "movie", "show", "show_season", "show_episode". Use with seasonNumber and episodeNumber to identify the exact content.

jwEntityId.description: Title identifier with type prefix (tm = movie, ts = show). Always refers to the top-level title, even for season/episode events. Join to objects: cc_title:jwEntityId::TEXT = objects.object_id.

jwRawEntityId.description: Most granular object identifier with prefix: tm = movie, ts = show, tss = season, tse = episode. For episode events, gives the specific episode/season ID. ~38% fill rate.

seasonNumber.description: Season number (1, 2, 3...). Present for season/episode events (~15% of all events). NULL for movies.

episodeNumber.description: Episode number within the season. Present for episode events (~13%). NULL for movies and show-level events.

index.description: Position of the title in a list or carousel (0-based). Present when the event originates from a list context (~11%). NULL otherwise.
